title: ImageOp Results
description:
ImageOp Results

ImageOp Results

The following list is a summary of the ImageOp object results with brief descriptions.  The details for each result are explained in the Vision Guide 8.0 Properties and Results Reference Manual.

Results	Description

Passed	Returns whether
		 the object detection result was accepted.

Time	Returns the
		 amount of time in milliseconds required to process the object
		 (unit:   millisecond).

FocusValue	Returns the
		 relative focus level.

The focus is
		 optimum when the value becomes the minimum.

This result
		 is displayed only when Operation property is set to DetectFocus.
